subcodes.first_line: This is the day whereof all peoples were given glad-tidings in the sacred Books of old, which each of the Prophets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که جمیع امم در کتب قبل بان بشارت داده شدند هر یک از نبیین و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
